dialogos.texto_en: Ah, that was fun!
Mmmmhh, I feel like we haven't played enough yet,\nbut maybe we have.
I hate to leave,\nbut let's go back to the hotel before it gets dark.
Seriously, Yotsuba, you still have energy to play?
Of course, I can keep going!\nUesugi-san...not so much.
Yeah, as you can see,\nI've used up all my energy for today.
I'm tired too... Even changing out of my swimsuit\nfeels like a hassle...
M-Miku, get a hold of yourself!\nYou can't walk around town like that?!
Ahaha!\nYou two both need to build up more stamina to play more!
Honestly, how often do we get the chance to play\nuntil we're completely exhausted?
If you're too tired,\nhow about I give you a piggyback ride back to the hotel?
No way. I'm not light, you know.
Are you sure about that?\nI have more stamina than you!\nSee, I'm still full of energy!
Even if that's true, it's impossible.\nAre you planning to carry a grown man on your back?
Don't worry, by channeling the power of my love\nfor you, Futaro-kun, I'll somehow manage.
L-love...?!
That's right.\nIf you feel like you can't walk, just say so.
I already told you, I'm fine.\nBy the way...
Aren't you acting a little weird lately?
Hm? How so?
Well, it's hard to explain, but...
You're expressing your love for Uesugi-san more than usual,\nIchika!
D-don't say thing things like that so frankly!
(Although, she isn't wrong!\n That's the same strangeness that I feel as well!)
What's weird about it?\nI mean, I really love Futaro-kun.
Ooh...
Ohhhhhh...
How bold, Ichika-san!
Yeah, she's for sure acting weird.
Well, normally she's a bit more reserved, I suppose?
Hmm, maybe she just got a weird switch turned on\nbecause of the vacation.
No, really, everything's normal.\nI'm not being weird at all.
So let's just drop the subject!\nCome on, let's hurry back to the hotel and have dinner.
W-wait a minute!\nWe're still in our swimsuits, can't you see?!
Oh, right.\nFirst we need to change.\nOops, I completely forgot.
You are too forgetful...
(Is it just me\n or is Ichika acting strange?\n She seems kind of dazed or something...)
